nasb.text: When the Philistine looked and saw David, he disdained him; for he was but a youth, and ruddy, with a handsome appearance.

esv.text: And when the Philistine looked and saw David, he disdained him, for he was but a youth, ruddy and handsome in appearance.

cnv.text: 那非利士人觀看，看見了大衛，就藐視他，因為他年紀還輕，面色紅潤，外貌英俊。

ccb.text: 歌利亚见大卫是个面色红润、相貌英俊的少年，就藐视他。
